title: RulePackManifest
description: Velocity rule-packs.md — declares which external rule and standards packs to import

packs.description: List of rule packs to import

id.description: Unique identifier for this pack entry within the manifest

source.description: Source type. Determines how rules are fetched

enabled.description: Set false to disable this pack without removing the entry

packs.description: List of pack names to import from this source. For source: local, omit this field (all files in path are read)

path.description: Local filesystem path to read rules from. Required when source is 'local'

ref.description: Override the default source repository URL. Useful for private forks or mirrors

PackOverrides.description: Per-pack overrides applied during normalization and conversion

severity.description: Downgrade all rules in this pack to the specified severity. Useful for third-party packs that are too strict for your team

skip_classifications.description: Skip rules of the specified classification types from this pack

tag_filter.description: Import only rules matching at least one of these tags. If empty, all rules are imported

exclude_rule_ids.description: Explicit list of rule IDs to skip from this pack
